notes: All source explosion sheets were processed with checkerboard edge-connected removal and auto component splitting.
A catalog and contact sheet are generated for all 149 split parts; large or decorative parts remain in the prepared library but are not wired blindly into the runtime.
47 reusable components are curated under assets/generated/pinyin-racer-semantic-assets; level-05 green chroma-key facilities were separately cleaned and named.
The five background files are the current runtime maps for the five pinyin racer segments.
